title: haplopappus scaposus
intro: Haplopappus scaposus, also known as the mountain fleabane, is a flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Haplopappus scaposus include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as alleviating pain and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for internal use, and it can also be used topically in the form of salves or poultices.
